title: Hotel Cleaning Standards Playbook for Egypt
trigger: Initiated when a guest checks out or when a room requires cleaning as per the schedule.

steps.title: Preparation and Safety Check
steps.action: Ensure all cleaning equipment and supplies are ready and in good condition. Conduct a safety check to ensure compliance with local fire safety codes and ADA requirements.

steps.title: Room Inspection
steps.action: Inspect the room for any maintenance issues or items left behind by guests. Report any issues to the maintenance department immediately.

next_steps.condition: If no maintenance issues are found

steps.title: Report Maintenance Issues
steps.action: Log maintenance issues in the PMS and notify the maintenance team for immediate action.

steps.title: Cleaning and Sanitization
steps.action: Clean and sanitize the room following the hotel's cleaning standards. Pay special attention to high-touch areas such as door handles, light switches, and remote controls.

steps.title: Final Inspection and Setup
steps.action: Conduct a final inspection to ensure the room meets the hotel's quality standards. Set up the room with fresh linens and amenities.

steps.title: Update Room Status
steps.action: Update the room status in the PMS to 'Clean' and ready for the next guest.

description: This playbook outlines the cleaning standards and procedures for hotel rooms in Egypt, ensuring compliance with local regulations and enhancing guest satisfaction.
escalation_path: Report any issues to the Operations Manager if they cannot be resolved by the Housekeeping Supervisor.
